variants.title: Fleetguard AF437K Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the Donaldson P776636
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF437K axial seal primary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 99.9%

variants.title: Mann Filter C 14 179 x Air Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P776636
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filters for clean air intake and optimum protection for your engine, mass air flow sensor & other sensitive components / They meet requirements of modern engine technology. Highest dirt holding capacity and dirt separation efficiency, low flow resistance and high pleat stability ensure functional reliability during the entire service interval.
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 99.9%

variants.title: Donaldson P776636 Air Filter, Primary Finned
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P776636 Air Filter, Primary Finned features a finned design that maximizes surface area for enhanced dust-holding capacity and airflow. It effectively filters airborne contaminants, ensuring clean intake air and improving engine performance and longevity. Ideal for engines operating in dusty environments, this primary air filter offers durable construction and long service intervals. Its efficient filtration helps reduce engine wear and supports consistent power output.
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 99.9%
